prestazioni: 2.5L TFSI DAZA engine (EA855 Evo) upgraded with a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (88mm compressor, 1.35 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and a Milltek Sport 3.5-inch catless exhaust system, pushing 750 HP on E85 fuel with a Cobb Tuning Stage 3+ ECU calibration and a Bosch Motorsport 0261S02088 high-flow fuel pump

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the TT RS Clubsport chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts from Vibratechnics, paired with H&R 25mm front and 28mm rear anti-roll bars with adjustable end links

AP Racing CP9661-1000 6-piston front and CP9434-850 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm x 38mm two-piece floating rotors (grooved and cryo-treated) and Ferodo DS2500 race pads, running Motul RBF 660 brake fluid and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3D-printed ABS extension flares to accommodate 20x10.5 ET35 front and 20x12 ET40 rear BBS LM-R wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear)

Audi Sport TT RS Clubsport-specific carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts and a custom titanium mesh grille insert, paired with a carbon fiber rear wing (2.2m span, 3D-printed aluminum endplates) mounted on KW Automotive adjustable carbon fiber pedestals

Full interior strip-out with a custom Tillet B10 carbon fiber racing seat (HANS-compatible) mounted on a Schroth Profi II 6-point harness, a MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay with a Motec C127 digital dash and AiM MXL2 data logger
